evals.prompt: Stream the Bitcoin price in real time. I want to see the live feed with OHLC and volume.
evals.expected_output: Subscribes to the Bitquery WebSocket (stream_bitquery.py or inline gql subscription), uses Trading.Tokens subscription for bid:bitcoin with 1s duration, and streams formatted OHLC and USD volume for each tick in real time.

evals.prompt: I need a real-time Bitcoin price feed with derived metrics — moving averages and change per tick.
evals.expected_output: Runs the streaming script or subscription that returns OHLC, Volume, and Price.Average (Mean, SMA, EMA, WMA); optionally computes tick-to-tick % change and presents derived metrics on the stream.

evals.prompt: Subscribe to the Bitcoin price feed and show me the latest ticks as they come in.
evals.expected_output: Connects via WebSocket to Bitquery, subscribes to Trading.Tokens for bid:bitcoin (1s ticks), and prints each tick as it is streamed until the user stops or timeout.
